did.unittitle: Octagon buildings in New York State / / from information and photographs supplied by Stephen R. Leonard, Sr. ; with a foreword by Carl Carmer ; compiled by Ruby M. Rounds.
did.abstract: "Octagon buildings of New York State" and a note.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Collection consists of the pamphlet, "Octagon buildings of New York State" and a note.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Cover title: Octagon buildings of New York State.
